title: Folding Index Transition
prompt:
Create a production-ready Folding Index Transition component using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. The pattern is a distinctive numbered route fold for a light Bento interface. Use a white or #F4F5F6 background, #111111 primary text, #4A4A4F supporting text, #ECECEE borders, 20–24px corner radii, and a very soft shadow. Use mint as the only bright accent and never apply a gradient to the card. The meaningful resting state is clearly visible in server rendering, while the destination route is revealed by an intentional local interaction rather than decoration.

Use semantic HTML and real controls. Pointer hover may lift the surface by 2px over 180ms; pressing a control compresses it for 90ms. Activation must be available through Enter and Space, update an explicit aria-pressed or aria-current state where appropriate, and announce the concise result through a polite live region. Use Framer Motion with a spring near stiffness 320 and damping 28 for the focal marker, plus a 180–240ms opacity and transform transition for coordinated content. Do not use an ambient loop unless the component is a loader. Preserve a visible dark focus ring, logical tab order, and 44px minimum touch targets.

Make the component responsive from 320px to desktop, keeping labels readable inside compact cards and larger detail previews with no fixed positioning. Prefer transform and opacity; avoid remote assets, browser storage, random values, network calls, and uncleared timers. Meet AA contrast, use ARIA only where native semantics are insufficient, and respect prefers-reduced-motion by using a stable final state or brief opacity fade. Return complete paste-ready TypeScript React code and a pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML: <section class="uiwiki-folding-index-transition"><button>Inspect pattern</button></section> */
.uiwiki-folding-index-transition{max-width:22rem;padding:20px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:22px;background:#fff;color:#111;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(17,17,17,.06)}.uiwiki-folding-index-transition button{min-height:44px;padding:0 16px;border:0;border-radius:12px;background:#111;color:#fff;font-weight:800;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-folding-index-transition button:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-folding-index-transition button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-folding-index-transition *{transition:none!important}}
